summary: Crash recovery, dock fixes, faster news, cleaner top bar.
release_notes: App now automatically recovers from background crashes instead of silently stopping.
Fixed docked trading terminal undocking when closed and reopened.
Fixed docked trading terminal undocking after re-login.
News now loads instantly on startup instead of showing a loading skeleton.
Settings and Help moved into the account dropdown for a cleaner top bar.
Settings help now shows both TWS ports: 7496 for live, 7497 for paper trading.
